title: salvia holwayi var. holwayi
intro: Salvia holwayi var. holwayi is a plant species belonging to the Salvia genus, commonly known as the blue sage, which is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of Salvia holwayi var. holwayi include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include reducing anxiety and stress, improving cognitive function, and aiding in the management of pain, making it a popular herb in traditional medicine. Salvia holwayi var. holwayi can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
